user.title: Connect to Dwelo
user.description:
Paste your Dwelo API token.

To get it: open Chrome DevTools → Network tab, sign in to web.dwelo.com, find any request to api.dwelo.com, and copy the value after `Token ` in the Authorization header.

select_unit.title: Select Unit
select_unit.description: Multiple units were found. Select the one to configure.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid token — please re-copy it from the browser DevTools Authorization header.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the Dwelo API. Check your network and try again.
error.no_units: No units found for this token. Verify the account has an assigned unit.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the Home Assistant logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This Dwelo unit is already configured.
